cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.seo_description: Learn how Isaías Velásquez Landscaping Services uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and remember your preferences on our website.
cookies.intro: This page explains how {{name}} uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on the site.

what.title: What Are Cookies
what.body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember your preferences, improve navigation, and analyze site traffic.

how.title: How We Use Cookies
how.body: We use essential cookies for basic site functionality, performance cookies to understand how visitors interact with content, and functionality cookies to remember your preferences.

control.title: Cookie Control
control.body: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. Please note that some site features may be affected if you disable certain cookies.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: If you have questions about this cookie policy, you can email us at {{email}}.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.seo_description: Isaías Velásquez Landscaping Services is committed to web accessibility for all users. Learn about our accessibility features and standards.
accessibility.intro: {{name}} is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for all people, regardless of their abilities.

standards.title: Standards
standards.body: We strive to comply with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA, ensuring our site is perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust.

features.title: Features
features.body: Clear and consistent navigation, alternative text for images, adequate contrast, screen reader compatibility, and keyboard navigation support.

limitations.title: Limitations
limitations.body: We continuously work to improve accessibility. If you encounter any barriers, please contact us for assistance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: To report accessibility issues or request assistance, email us at {{email}}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seo_description: Read the privacy policy of Isaías Velásquez Landscaping Services. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit our website.
privacy.intro: This page explains how {{name}} may collect, use, and protect visitor information.
privacy.notice_text: This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our website or request our landscaping services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.body: Describe the contact details, enquiry data, analytics events, booking information, or media uploads you collect through your website and business workflows.

usage.title: How We Use Information
usage.body: Explain how that information supports replies, quotations, scheduling, customer service, remarketing, billing, or operational follow-up.

sharing.title: Third-Party Services
sharing.body: List any external tools involved in hosting, analytics, CRM, payments, maps, advertising, or form delivery, and explain when data may be shared with them.

contact.title: Questions About Privacy
contact.body: If visitors have questions about your privacy practices, direct them to {{email}} or your preferred compliance contact.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.seo_description: Read the terms of service for Isaías Velásquez Landscaping Services. Understand the guidelines for using our website and requesting our landscaping services.
terms.intro: These terms describe the baseline rules for using the {{name}} website and requesting information about its services.
terms.notice_text: These terms describe the rules for using our website and requesting landscaping services from Isaías Velásquez Landscaping Services.

use.title: Use of This Website
use.body: Explain what visitors can expect from the information published on the site and state that service details, availability, and scope may change as the business is updated.

estimates.title: Quotes, Bookings, or Enquiries
estimates.body: Clarify that submitted forms or calls do not create a binding agreement on their own, and explain when work, pricing, deposits, or approvals become official.

liability.title: Limitations and Responsibility
liability.body: Use this section to set reasonable limits around website accuracy, third-party tools, availability, and any business-specific legal boundaries that apply to your services.

contact.title: Questions About These Terms
contact.body: For questions about your business terms, direct visitors to {{email}} or the contact channel you use for formal enquiries.
